revision.text:
{{sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Mahāyāna Buddhism | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse | basestyle = background:#FFD700; | headingstyle = border-bottom:5px solid #efefef; | listtitlestyle = background:#FFD700;padding:0.2em;text-align:center | liststyle = background-color:#FFFFE0; border: 2px solid #FFFFE0 | class = hlist | image = [[File:Ashtamangala Lotus.svg|150px|A Lotus, one of the [[Ashtamangala|eight auspicious symbols]] in Mahāyāna]] | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Mahayana|a series]] on | title = [[Mahayana|{{color|#A0522D|Mahāyāna Buddhism}}]] | list1title = Teachings | list1 = * [[Bodhisattva]] * [[Buddhahood]] * [[Bodhicitta|Mind of Awakening]] * [[Buddha-nature]] * [[Upaya|Skillful Means]] * [[Prajnaparamita|Transcendent Wisdom]] * [[Pāramitā|Transcendent Virtues]] * [[Śūnyatā#Mahayana Buddhism|Emptiness]] * [[Two truths doctrine|Two truths]] * [[Yogachara#The_doctrine_of_Vijñapti-mātra|Consciousness-only]] * [[Trikaya|Three bodies]] * [[Yana (Buddhism)|Three vehicles]] * [[Nirvana_(Buddhism)#Apratiṣṭhita_nirvāna|Non-abiding Nirvana]] * [[Ekayāna|One Vehicle]] * [[Bodhisattva Precepts]] * [[Bodhisattva vow]] * [[Bhūmi (Buddhism)|Bodhisattva stages]] * [[Pure land|Pure Lands]] * [[Luminous mind]] * [[Dharani]] * [[Three Turnings of the Wheel of Dharma|Three Turnings]]
| list2title = [[Buddhahood|Buddhas]] and [[Bodhisattva|Bodhisattvas]] | list2 = * [[Gautama Buddha|Shakyamuni]] * [[Amitābha|Amitabha]] * [[Adi-Buddha]] * [[Akshobhya]] * [[Prajñāpāramitā Devī]] * [[Bhaisajyaguru|Bhaiṣajyaguru]] * [[Vairocana]] * [[Manjushri|Mañjuśrī]] * [[Avalokiteśvara]] * [[Vajrapani|Vajrapāṇi]] * [[Vajrasattva]] * [[Maitreya]] * [[Kṣitigarbha]] * [[Ākāśagarbha]] * [[Samantabhadra (Bodhisattva)|Samantabhadra]] * [[Tara (Buddhism)|Tara]] * [[Wrathful deities]]
| list3title = [[Mahayana sutras]] | list3 = * ''[[prajnaparamita|Prajñāpāramitā sūtras]]'' * [[Lotus Sutra|''Lotus Sūtra'']] * {{IAST|[[Avatamsaka Sutra|Buddhāvataṃsaka Sūtra]]}} * ''[[Mahāratnakūṭa Sūtra]]'' * ''[[Mahasamnipata Sutra|Mahāsaṃnipāta Sūtra]]'' * {{IAST|''[[Vimalakirti-nirdesa|Vimalakirtinirdeśa]]''}} * ''[[Pure Land Buddhism#Key Mahayana sources|Pure Land Sutras]]'' * ''[[Lalitavistara Sūtra]]'' * ''[[Samadhiraja Sutra|Samādhirāja Sūtra]]'' * {{IAST|[[Sandhinirmocana Sutra|''Saṃdhinirmocana Sūtra'']]}} * ''[[Tathāgatagarbha sūtras]]'' * ''[[Śrīmālādevī Siṃhanāda Sūtra|Śrīmālādevī Sūtra]]'' * ''[[Mahāyāna Mahāparinirvāṇa Sūtra|Mahāparinirvāṇa Sūtra]]'' * {{IAST|''[[Śūraṅgama Samādhi Sūtra]]''}} * ''[[Lankavatara Sutra|Laṅkāvatāra Sūtra]]'' * ''[[Ghanavyūha Sūtra|Ghanavyūha sūtra]]'' * ''[[Golden Light Sutra]]'' * ''[[Tathāgataguhyaka Sūtra]]'' * ''[[Kāraṇḍavyūha Sūtra]]''
| list4title = [[Schools of Buddhism#Mahāyāna schools|Major schools]] | list4 = * [[Madhyamaka|Mādhyamaka]] * [[Yogacara|Yogācāra]] * [[Tiantai]] * [[Tendai]] * [[Huayan school|Huayan]] * [[Zen]] * [[Shingon Buddhism|Shingon]] * [[Pure Land Buddhism|Pure Land]] * [[Nichiren Buddhism|Nichiren]] * [[Vajrayana|Vajrayāna]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism]] * [[Dzogchen]] * [[Fo Guang Shan]] * [[Tzu Chi]] * [[Dharma Drum Mountain|Fa Gu Shan]] * [[Chung Tai Shan]]
| list5title = Key figures | list5 = * [[Nagarjuna|Nāgārjuna]] * [[Aśvaghoṣa|Ashvaghosha]] * [[Aryadeva|Āryadeva]] * [[Lokaksema (Buddhist monk)|Lokakṣema]] * [[Kumārajīva]] * [[Asanga]] * [[Vasubandhu]] * [[Sthiramati]] * [[Buddhapālita]] * [[Dignāga]] * [[Bhāviveka|Bhāvaviveka]] * [[Dharmakirti|Dharmakīrti]] * [[Chandrakirti|Candrakīrti]] * [[Zhiyi]] * [[Bodhidharma]] * [[Huineng]] * [[Shandao]] * [[Xuanzang]] * [[Fazang]] * [[Amoghavajra]] * [[Saichō]] * [[Kūkai]] * [[Shantideva|Shāntideva]] * [[Śāntarakṣita|Shāntarakshita]] * [[Wonhyo|Wohnyo]] * [[Mazu Daoyi]] * [[Jinul]] * [[Dahui Zonggao]] * [[Hongzhi Zhengjue]] * [[Hōnen]] * [[Shinran]] * [[Dōgen]] * [[Nichiren]] * [[Śaṅkaranandana]] * [[Virūpa]] * [[Ratnākaraśānti]] * [[Abhayakaragupta|Abhayākaragupta]] * [[Naropa|Nāropā]] * [[Atiśa|Atisha]] * [[Sakya Pandita]] * [[Dolpopa Sherab Gyaltsen|Dolpopa]] * [[Rangjung Dorje, 3rd Karmapa Lama|Rangjung Dorje]] * [[Je Tsongkhapa|Tsongkhapa]] * [[Longchenpa]] * [[Hakuin Ekaku|Hakuin]] * [[Hanshan Deqing|Hanshan]] * [[Taixu]] * [[D. T. Suzuki]] * [[Sheng-yen]] * [[14th Dalai Lama]] * [[Thích Nhất Hạnh]]
| list6title = Regional traditions | list6 = * [[Buddhism in China|China]] ** [[Chinese Buddhism|Han Chinese]] * [[Buddhism in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japan]] * [[Buddhism in Korea|Korea]] * [[Buddhism in Vietnam|Vietnam]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] * [[Buddhism in Nepal|Nepal]] * [[Newar Buddhism|Newar]] * [[Buddhism in Bhutan|Bhutan]] * [[Buddhism in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Buddhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] * [[Buddhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] * [[Buddhism in the West|West]]
}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- place category and language links on the /doc sub-page, not here --></noinclude>

{{sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Mahāyāna Buddhism | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse | basestyle = background:#FFD700; | headingstyle = border-bottom:5px solid #efefef; | listtitlestyle = background:#FFD700;padding:0.2em;text-align:center | liststyle = background-color:#FFFFE0; border: 2px solid #FFFFE0 | class = hlist | image = [[File:Ashtamangala Lotus.svg|150px|A Lotus, one of the [[Ashtamangala|eight auspicious symbols]] in Mahāyāna]] | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Mahayana|a series]] on | title = [[Mahayana|{{color|#A0522D|Mahāyāna Buddhism}}]] | list1title = Teachings | list1 = * [[Bodhisattva]] * [[Buddhahood]] * [[Bodhicitta|Mind of Awakening]] * [[Buddha-nature]] * [[Upaya|Skillful Means]] * [[Prajnaparamita|Transcendent Wisdom]] * [[Pāramitā|Transcendent Virtues]] * [[Śūnyatā#Mahayana Buddhism|Emptiness]] * [[Two truths doctrine|Two truths]] * [[Yogachara#The_doctrine_of_Vijñapti-mātra|Consciousness-only]] * [[Trikaya|Three bodies]] * [[Yana (Buddhism)|Three vehicles]] * [[Nirvana_(Buddhism)#Apratiṣṭhita_nirvāna|Non-abiding Nirvana]] * [[Ekayāna|One Vehicle]] * [[Bodhisattva Precepts]] * [[Bodhisattva vow]] * [[Bhūmi (Buddhism)|Bodhisattva stages]] * [[Pure land|Pure Lands]] * [[Luminous mind]] * [[Dharani]] * [[Three Turnings of the Wheel of Dharma|Three Turnings]]
| list2title = [[Buddhahood|Buddhas]] and [[Bodhisattva|Bodhisattvas]] | list2 = * [[Gautama Buddha|Shakyamuni]] * [[Amitābha|Amitabha]] * [[Adi-Buddha]] * [[Akshobhya]] * [[Prajñāpāramitā Devī]] * [[Bhaisajyaguru|Bhaiṣajyaguru]] * [[Vairocana]] * [[Manjushri|Mañjuśrī]] * [[Avalokiteśvara]] * [[Vajrapani|Vajrapāṇi]] * [[Vajrasattva]] * [[Maitreya]] * [[Kṣitigarbha]] * [[Ākāśagarbha]] * [[Samantabhadra (Bodhisattva)|Samantabhadra]] * [[Tara (Buddhism)|Tara]] * [[Wrathful deities]]
| list3title = [[Mahayana sutras]] | list3 = * ''[[prajnaparamita|Prajñāpāramitā sūtras]]'' * [[Lotus Sutra|''Lotus Sūtra'']] * {{IAST|[[Avatamsaka Sutra|Buddhāvataṃsaka Sūtra]]}} * ''[[Mahāratnakūṭa Sūtra]]'' * ''[[Mahasamnipata Sutra|Mahāsaṃnipāta Sūtra]]'' * {{IAST|''[[Vimalakirti-nirdesa|Vimalakirtinirdeśa]]''}} * ''[[Pure Land Buddhism#Key Mahayana sources|Pure Land Sutras]]'' * ''[[Lalitavistara Sūtra]]'' * ''[[Samadhiraja Sutra|Samādhirāja Sūtra]]'' * {{IAST|[[Sandhinirmocana Sutra|''Saṃdhinirmocana Sūtra'']]}} * ''[[Tathāgatagarbha sūtras]]'' * ''[[Śrīmālādevī Siṃhanāda Sūtra|Śrīmālādevī Sūtra]]'' * ''[[Mahāyāna Mahāparinirvāṇa Sūtra|Mahāparinirvāṇa Sūtra]]'' * {{IAST|''[[Śūraṅgama Samādhi Sūtra]]''}} * ''[[Lankavatara Sutra|Laṅkāvatāra Sūtra]]'' * ''[[Ghanavyūha Sūtra|Ghanavyūha sūtra]]'' * ''[[Golden Light Sutra]]'' * ''[[Tathāgataguhyaka Sūtra]]'' * ''[[Kāraṇḍavyūha Sūtra]]''
| list4title = [[Schools of Buddhism#Mahāyāna schools|Major schools]] | list4 = * [[Madhyamaka|Mādhyamaka]] * [[Yogacara|Yogācāra]] * [[Tiantai]] * [[Tendai]] * [[Huayan school|Huayan]] * [[Zen]] * [[Shingon Buddhism|Shingon]] * [[Pure Land Buddhism|Pure Land]] * [[Nichiren Buddhism|Nichiren]] * [[Vajrayana|Vajrayāna]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism]] * [[Dzogchen]] * [[Fo Guang Shan]] * [[Tzu Chi]] * [[Dharma Drum Mountain|Fa Gu Shan]] * [[Chung Tai Shan]]
| list5title = Key figures | list5 = * [[Nagarjuna|Nāgārjuna]] * [[Aśvaghoṣa|Ashvaghosha]] * [[Aryadeva|Āryadeva]] * [[Lokaksema (Buddhist monk)|Lokakṣema]] * [[Kumārajīva]] * [[Asanga]] * [[Vasubandhu]] * [[Sthiramati]] * [[Buddhapālita]] * [[Dignāga]] * [[Bhāviveka|Bhāvaviveka]] * [[Dharmakirti|Dharmakīrti]] * [[Chandrakirti|Candrakīrti]] * [[Zhiyi]] * [[Bodhidharma]] * [[Huineng]] * [[Shandao]] * [[Xuanzang]] * [[Fazang]] * [[Amoghavajra]] * [[Saichō]] * [[Kūkai]] * [[Shantideva|Shāntideva]] * [[Śāntarakṣita|Shāntarakshita]] * [[Wonhyo|Wohnyo]] * [[Mazu Daoyi]] * [[Jinul]] * [[Dahui Zonggao]] * [[Hongzhi Zhengjue]] * [[Hōnen]] * [[Shinran]] * [[Dōgen]] * [[Nichiren]] * [[Śaṅkaranandana]] * [[Virūpa]] * [[Ratnākaraśānti]] * [[Abhayakaragupta|Abhayākaragupta]] * [[Naropa|Nāropā]] * [[Atiśa|Atisha]] * [[Sakya Pandita]] * [[Dolpopa Sherab Gyaltsen|Dolpopa]] * [[Rangjung Dorje, 3rd Karmapa Lama|Rangjung Dorje]] * [[Je Tsongkhapa|Tsongkhapa]] * [[Longchenpa]] * [[Hakuin Ekaku|Hakuin]] * [[Hanshan Deqing|Hanshan]] * [[Taixu]] * [[D. T. Suzuki]] * [[Sheng-yen]] * [[14th Dalai Lama]] * [[Thích Nhất Hạnh]]
| list6title = Regional traditions | list6 = * [[Buddhism in China|China]] ** [[Chinese Buddhism|Han Chinese]] * [[Buddhism in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japan]] * [[Buddhism in Korea|Korea]] * [[Buddhism in Vietnam|Vietnam]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] * [[Buddhism in Nepal|Nepal]] * [[Newar Buddhism|Newar]] * [[Buddhism in Bhutan|Bhutan]] * [[Buddhism in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Buddhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] * [[Buddhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] * [[Buddhism in the West|West]]
}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- place category and language links on the /doc sub-page, not here --></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
